channel.title: Anthropic on TechWave Hub
channel.description: Recent content in Anthropic on TechWave Hub

item.title: Anthropic & Claude: The Company, the Founders, and the AI Built for Safety
item.description: Who built Claude AI? Learn everything about Anthropic, its founders Dario and Daniela Amodei, and the story behind the AI assistant built to be safe and helpful.
